subcodes.first_line: The remembrance of God from the Lote-Tree of Command was at that time uplifted, even as My call was raised from the Tree of Sinai [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر الله عن سدره الامر قد کان حینئذ مرفوعا کما ارتفع ندائی من سدره السینا
